name: bento
description: Composable bento grid system. BentoGrid + BentoCell for raw layout, BentoFeatureCell for icon/label cards, BentoContentCell for text, BentoVisualCell for image fills, plus BentoSplit (two-column interlocking overlap), BentoSplitPanel, BentoBleed (cross-seam media) and BentoNotch (concave interlock corners).
